finalVerdict:
== User claim verification ==
Claim 1: "zai فقط در مدل glm 5.2 از قابلیت ThinkingEfforts پشتیبانی می کند"
  Result: 3 models support thinking: ["glm-4.7","GLM-5.1","glm-5.2"]
  Verdict: REFUTED — thinking is supported on multiple models, not just glm-5.2

Claim 2: "از دو مدل max, high پشتیبانی میکند" (only max + high)
  Result: glm-5.2 supported efforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  Verdict: REFUTED — more than 2 effort levels work on glm-5.2

== Recommendation for registry ==
Based on test results, zai-web-token registry should declare:
  - glm-4.7: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  - GLM-5.1: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
  - glm-5.2: supportedThinkingEfforts = ["low","medium","high","xhigh","max"]
